data.body:
Great to see this, but the choices of stations skipped are very interesting to me.
* Georgetown is normally the holding point to pass CN freight 
* My Dennis is a good direct connection to midtown east-west rapid transit. It's skipped in favour of Bloor, a longer tedious connection closer to Union
